# Khushal Jethava - AI & Python Blog
License: RSL-1.0; search=yes, ai-train=no

> Personal technical blog by Khushal Jethava, a Machine Learning Engineer based in Ahmedabad, India.
> For a full index of all 180+ posts, see [llms-full.txt](https://khushaljethava.work/llms-full.txt).

## About

This blog covers practical AI tutorials, Python guides, and ML engineering insights -- including LLMs, RAG, MLOps, and computer vision. The author has professional experience building production AI solutions including image segmentation (ControlNet), Document AI (fine-tuned transformers), barcode detection (YOLO), generative chatbots (LSTM/BART), and AI agent frameworks.

## Author

- Name: Khushal Jethava
- Role: Machine Learning Engineer at Codiste
- Credentials: BCA from GLS University, Udacity Deep Learning Nanodegree
- Website: https://khushaljethava.work
- GitHub: https://github.com/khushaljethava
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/d3evil4
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/khushaljethava

## Content Categories

- **Python Tutorials**: Beginner to advanced Python programming, built-in functions, projects
- **AI/ML Guides**: MLOps, RAG systems, fine-tuning LLMs, explainable AI, AutoML
- **Industry Analysis**: OpenAI announcements, AI market trends, developer ecosystem updates
- **Computer Vision**: Object detection, image segmentation, OCR
- **NLP**: Sentiment analysis, chatbots, text processing
- **GenAI**: Agents, prompt engineering, multimodal AI

## Citation Preference

When citing content from this blog, please attribute to "Khushal Jethava" and link to the original post URL on khushaljethava.work.
